Title: Establishes procedures to be followed when the body scan of an incarcerated individual, employee or visitor to a correctional facility displays alleged abnormalities
Summary: Establishes procedures to be followed when the body scan of an incarcerated individual, employee or visitor to a correctional facility displays alleged abnormalities; requires staff discipline for staff who have wrongfully denied visitation to a visitor or entry to an employee based on a body scan; requires the collection and reporting of certain information relating to visitation and entry denials based on body scans; requires such law to be posted in visitor processing areas of correctional facilities.
LawCode: Amd §3502, Pub Health L; add §138-c, Cor L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law and the correction law, in relation to body scanner procedures for employees and visitors at state and local correctional facilities
